sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 제너럴 다이내믹스는 2025년 매출 526억 달러와 수주잔고 1,180억 달러를 기록하며 전 사업 부문에서 성장세를 보였습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 매출 526억 달러, 순이익 42억 달러를 달성하며 전년 대비 각각 10.1%, 11.3% 성장했습니다.
4분기 수주액 224억 달러를 기록하며 연간 수주잔고 1,180억 달러로 한 해를 마감했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 4개 사업 부문 모두에서 매출과 이익이 성장했으며, 전사적 수주잔고가 30% 증가하는 성과를 거두었습니다.
미래 성장을 위해 2025년 12억 달러의 자본 지출을 집행했으며, 향후 더 많은 투자를 계획하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 연간 희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 15.45달러로 전년 대비 13.4% 증가했습니다.
4분기 영업활동 현금흐름은 16억 달러로 순이익의 137% 수준을 달성했습니다.
연간 배당금으로 16억 달러를 지급하고 총부채를 7억 4,900만 달러 감축했습니다.

watchItems.text: 경영진이 언급한 향후 자본 지출 확대 계획이 구체적으로 어떤 사업 부문에 집중될지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Exhibit 99.1 11011 Sunset Hills Road Reston, Virginia 20190 News www.gd.com Contact: Jeff A. Davis Tel: 703 876 3483 press@generaldynamics.com General Dynamics Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results January 28, 2026 • Fourth-quarter net earnings of $1.1 billion, diluted EPS of $4.17, on $14.4 billion in revenue • Full-year net earnings of $4.2 billion, diluted EPS of $15.45, on $52.6 billion in revenue • $1.6 billion cash provided by operating activities in the quarter, 137% of net earnings • $1.2 billion in capital expenditures for the year, up 27% from 2024 • Book-to-bill of 1.6x in the quarter and 1.5x for the full year, ending the year with $118 bill  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $14.4 billion = 144억 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $52.6 billion = 526억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $118 billion = 1,180억 달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $14.4 = 14.4달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $4.2 = 4.2달러; $15.45 = 15.45달러; $52.6 = 52.6달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $118 = 118달러.

ere $4.2 billion, up 11.3% from 2024, on revenue of $52.6 billion, up 10.1% from 2024. Diluted EPS for the full year was $15.45, up 13.4% from 2024. “We had a solid fourth quarter, capping off a year that saw growth in revenue and earnings in all four segments coupled with an impressive 30% growth in company-wide backlog,” said Phebe N. Novakovic, chairman and chief executive officer. “As we focus on execution of programs for our customers, we are also preparing aggressively for future growth, investing nearly $1.2 billion in capital expenditures in 2025 – with even more investments planned in the year ahead.” Cash Cash provided by operating activities in the quarter totaled $1.6 billion, or 137% of net earnings. For the ye  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $52.6 billion = 526억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $1 billion = 10억 달러; $5.1 billion = 51억 달러; $4.2 = 4.2달러; $52.6 = 52.6달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $15.45 = 15.45달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $1 = 1달러; $5.1 = 5.1달러.

n in capital expenditures, made tax payments of $568 million, reduced total debt by $749 million and paid dividends of $1.6 billion, ending 2025 with $2.3 billion in cash and equivalents on hand. – more – Orders and Backlog Demand remained strong across the company, with orders of $22.4 billion during the quarter. Consolidated book-to-bill ratio, defined as orders divided by revenue, was 1.6-to-1 for the quarter and 1.5-to-1 for the year, with full-year book-to-bill exceeding 1-to-1 in each of the four segments.
